name: Cross-audience foundations
when_to_use: Design a documentation system, mode taxonomy, IA, versioning model, accessibility baseline, or feedback loop

name: Developer documentation
when_to_use: Design README, quickstart, reference, tutorial, cookbook, example, changelog, or developer search structure

name: End-user help
when_to_use: Design in-product help, onboarding guidance, empty states, tooltips, help center IA, or UX microcopy

name: Agent-readable documentation
when_to_use: Design llms.txt, agent-readable markdown, retrieval-friendly pages, or always-loaded vs load-on-demand docs

name: API and tool contracts
when_to_use: Design machine-readable API/tool documentation, structured errors, examples, retry semantics, or metadata

name: Audience conflicts
when_to_use: Design a resolution when human docs and agent docs pull in different directions
